ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., 2023 General Election) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., Primary, General, Special Ballot) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the election took place */,
  "is_special_ballot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is a special ballot */,
  "is_early_voting" INTEGER /* Indicates if early voting is available for the election */,
  "is_mail_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if mail-in voting is allowed */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "total_active_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of active voters who are eligible to vote */,
  "total_voters_voted" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who actually voted */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total registered voters who voted */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting, if applicable */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting, if applicable */,
  "mail_in_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for mail-in voting, if applicable */,
  "mail_in_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for mail-in voting, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction (e.g., State Executive, King County, Seattle City) */,
  "jurisdiction_type" TEXT /* Type of the jurisdiction (e.g., State, County, City) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "voter_registration_link" TEXT /* Link to the voter registration page for the jurisdiction */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the jurisdiction */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., Initiative Measure No. 1433) */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the measure */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the measure is part of */,
  "is_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measure has passed */,
  "vote_count_for" INTEGER /* Number of votes in favor of the measure */,
  "vote_count_against" INTEGER /* Number of votes against the measure */,
  "total_vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for the measure */,
  "percentage_for" REAL /* Percentage of votes in favor of the measure */,
  "percentage_against" REAL /* Percentage of votes against the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES measure_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Labor Standards, Campaign Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the candidate is running in */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "is_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate has withdrawn from the election */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the candidate withdrew, if applicable */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_of_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote result */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measure the result is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the result is for (NULL if it's a measure result) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage_of_total_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction where the result is from */,
  "early_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early voting votes */,
  "mail_in_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in voting votes */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast on election day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_until" TEXT /* Date until which the user account is locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., election, measure, candidate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data changed (e.g., election, measure, candidate) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data item changed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data item */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data item */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
